summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.rules; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.ICharacterScanner; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.IPredicateRule; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.IToken; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.Token; public class XMLTextPredicateRule implements IPredicateRule { private IToken token; private int charsRead; private boolean whiteSpaceOnly; boolean inCdata; public XMLTextPredicateRule(IToken text) { this.token = text; }
